              <;>
              simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
              <;>
              norm_num at *
              <;>
              linarith
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              exfalso
              simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
              <;>
              norm_num at *
              <;>
              simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
              <;>
              norm_num at *
              <;>
              linarith
            })
    exact h₃
  exact h₁
